TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ma-ni-la ť¶¨ŚįľśčČ == Ma-ni-la (Hue-li-pin a kamu:Maynil√†, ngalngal:(maj'nila Ē)Ôľõkamu nu Amilika:Manila), u Men-li-la, Ma-ni-la "kamu nu layak: B√ģn-l√≠-la tatengaay a ngangan u Ma-ni-la-se "Lungsod ng Maynila" u Hue-li-pin a suotu, itida i Hue-li-pin u satabakiay Li-sun-taw Ma-ni-la-wan a timulan nu dadipasan, picidekan Pa-se-sa'wac makayda i tukay nu teban nu niyadu'an, malatusa kina tukay timul amis a kitidaan. mala kanatal nu tapang a sakaudip, lalangawan, cyw-yi, kakulian, cen-ce atu ginginkuan. katukuh tu tuseptusep mihcaan, Ma-ni-la tukay i kitakitan nu sadecdecay a tukayan, maci nu tademaw makaala tu 1,846,516 ku tademaw, Ma-ni-la ina kanatal u kasenengan a tukay, nakaka caysiwsepcay mihcaan pitu bulad lucay demiad a Hue-li-pin wiyunhuy saka 183 banggu ni patucekan. ť¶¨ŚįľśčČ(ŤŹ≤ŚĺčŤ≥ďŤ™ě:Maynil√†, Áôľťü≥:(maj'nila Ē)ÔľõŤčĪŤ™ě:Manila), :B√ģn-l√≠-la),ś≠£ŚľŹŚźćÁ®ĪÁāļť¶¨ŚįľśčČŚłā(Lungsod ng Maynila) . hatiniay tu sakalecad nu tukayan, uyda u Sun-se ku mikiyadahay tu Ma-ni-la-se. Ma-ni-la nikasinganganan itida i sipaya sa, nikacaayan kalecad nu kamuan a nika caayan a nipatelacan a nipangangan u "Maynilad, kalingatuan itida i Ta-cya-lu-yi : "May uyni a yimian, nida a Ta-cya-lu-yi: "nild u cacay mulangaway tu salengacay salunganay a baluan, sasangaan tu cacengelen tu dawa a kilangan, hatidaay tu manauhay a tademaw saan " ya salengacay a nikacebal nu baluan, mahida u melimelitan nu mataan" saan, pulungen kina sulit u Ta-cya-lu-yi: Maynilad, ihekalay nu kanatalan atu tidaay a Huy-li-pin tademawan pangangan han u Ma-ni-la. pulung nu niyadu'an nu sabaw tu pitu nu tukayan a nikasakaputan. sakay Huy-li-pin a dayhiw atu giing tu sapisingkiw malaenem nu niyaduan. sakay kitakidan nu ginku mala pitu a baataan idaw ku siwa nu nika singangan nu Ma-ni-la. :Maynilad,ŤĶ∑śļźśĖľšĽĖŚä†Á•ŅŤ™ě:May :nilad :Maynilad, (Metro Manila), 79šĹć. itida i Si-pan-ya pidebungan tu Li-sun-taw itida i Su-lu-wan-caw a pikuwanan, cacay ci Maynil√† a sumamaday nu tademaw nai Ma-ni-la niyadu'an a palekal, taneng mitaayaw mikilim i caytulimwal mihcaan. sisa, sadikuday nu tademawan ci Luo-cu-su-lay-man sanse itida i Pan-ku nikasasetsetan a mademec, idaw ku cacayay a Sen-ti-ya-ke a pawley an kasenun han patideng i malumanay nu Maynil√† a kitidaan. sakikuday i caylimpiccay mihcaan enem bulad tusip demiad, Si-pan-ya midebungan ci Mi-ke-e. Luo-pey-se. De-lay-cya-se patideng tu Ma-ni-la, kilul sa mala Huy-li-pin babulawan a tatelungan nu sin-cen kitidaan, atu Su-u, Na-ya, Yi-luo malaSi-pan-ya walian In-tu kanatal Huy-li-pin a hun-cya a tukayan, ayda nina tukay idaw ku nipisingan tu nanutawyaay nikabulawan nu likisian. Maynil√† Maynil√† . Si-pan-ya tayda mabulaaw nu dimiadan Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôśģĖśįĎŚúįśôāśúü caylimpicsep mihcaan, makatukuh ku Si-pan-ya a tademaw i Ma-ni-la. caylimsiwlim mihcaan, Si-pan-ya sakamusa Ma-ni-la mala Huy-li-pin kanatal a subalan. caypicwalsiw mihcaan, mihang ku Si-pan-ya tu namaka nutawan a kanatal nu balungan patayni tu tuud i tini i Ma-ni-la, yu mahida caay pikeda ku Si-pan-ya tu namaka hekalay a kanatal itida i Huy-li-pin matenes a misiwbay. caywallusip mihcaan siwa bulad enem demiad, tahekal ku ngiha nu Si-pan-ya sakamusa Ma-ni-la u tada kanatal nu papataydaan tu tuud a minatuan sa, hamaw sa miales tu saday hekalay nu kanatal a kamuan. hida satu namaka cuwacuwaay nu kanatalan taydan namin i Ma-ni-la. caywalsiwwal mihcaan kalepacawan nu Amilika atu Si-pan-ya, mademec ku Si-pan-ya, Ma-ni-la sumad han u Amilika ku mikuwanay. 1570ŚĻī, . sakatusa a nikalepacawan šļĆśąįśôāśúü caysiwsiplu mihcaan cacay bulad tusa demiad, Ma-ni-la itida i Tay-pin-yeng nikalepacawan nu kakamuan nu Di-pun. caysiwsiplim mihcaan tusa bulad tulu demiad, alawen nu Amilika kina tukay, nika ahicaen miput tutay tu Ma-li-la a nikalekep mipatay tu tademaw. sakatusa a nikalepcawan, tukay nu Hui-li-pin mapeseng naming, nika nikalepacawan amelik sa misangan tu luma'. 1942ŚĻī1śúą2śó•, . tawya Áē∂ŚČć caysiwpiclim mihcaan, Ma-ni-la atu liklik nu tukay misakaput tu Ma-ni-la tatuhuy. ayda a Ma-ni-la " malakitakit atu kitakit nu tukay a mikikiway atu wan-lu nipatinsuan u kitakit nu macian, hamin nu kitakidan saka lusip nu kasinganganay nu tataydaan a tukay. 1975ŚĻī, . kitidaan ŚúįÁźÜ demiadśį£ŚÄô Ma-ni-la u demiad sapakayda i Ke-pen demiadan a kacaledesan kalasengesengetan. atu Hue-li-pin a duma nu niyadu'an, hamin nu Ma-ni-la u kacaledesan, mahida tu lalud ku sepat a puu'an. wi-tu micapi tu ce'-taw, kasumadan nu dimiad adidi', caay ka tayda i 20 ¬įC hakiya 38 ¬įC. talakaway ku kasengetan nu dimiadan. i sabaw tusa a buladan katukuh lima bula katinengan a kakelahan nu puu', duma nu demiadan diheku ku nikaudadan. kaudadan tu demidemiad nikahetikan nu udad mapulung tu apuyu' a demiadan, caay ka yadah ku sademiad sananay a udad. baliwsan i enemay bulad katuku siwa bulad a nikatayni. itida i tukay a masaniyadu'an idaw tu ku lesing mabalat. 20 ¬įCšĽ•šłčśąĖ38 ¬įCšĽ•šłä. .
S.PHON: == ma-ni-r~…ĺa *** == ma-ni-r~…ĺa (ńßu…ô-r~…ĺi-pin a kamu:majnir~…ĺ*, Ňčar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺ:(maj Ē~ °nir~…ĺa Ē)*kamu nu amir~…ĺika:manir~…ĺa), u m…ôn-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺa, ma-ni-r~…ĺa "kamu nu r~…ĺajak: b*n-r~…ĺ*-r~…ĺa tat…ôŇčaaj a ŇčaŇčan u ma-ni-r~…ĺa-s…ô "r~…ĺuŇčsod Ňč majnir~…ĺa" u ńßu…ô-r~…ĺi-pin a suotu, itida i ńßu…ô-r~…ĺi-pin u satabakiaj r~…ĺi-sun-taw ma-ni-r~…ĺa-wan a timur~…ĺan nu dadipasan, pi ¶id…ôkan pa-s…ô-sa Ē~ °wa ¶ makajda i tukaj nu t…ôban nu nijadu Ē~ °an, mar~…ĺatusa kina tukaj timur~…ĺ amis a kitidaan. mar~…ĺa kanatar~…ĺ nu tapaŇč a sakaudip, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, ¶jw-ji, kakur~…ĺian, ¶…ôn- ¶…ô atu giŇčinkuan. katukuńß tu tus…ôptus…ôp mińß ¶aan, ma-ni-r~…ĺa tukaj i kitakitan nu sad…ô ¶d…ô ¶aj a tukajan, ma ¶i nu tad…ômaw makaar~…ĺa tu *,***,*** ku tad…ômaw, ma-ni-r~…ĺa ina kanatar~…ĺ u kas…ôn…ôŇčan a tukaj, nakaka ¶ajsiws…ôp ¶aj mińß ¶aan pitu bur~…ĺad r~…ĺu ¶aj d…ômiad a ńßu…ô-r~…ĺi-pin wijunńßuj saka *** baŇčgu ni patu ¶…ôkan. ***(****:majnir~…ĺ*, **:(maj Ē~ °nir~…ĺa Ē)***:manir~…ĺa), :b*n-r~…ĺ*-r~…ĺa),*********(r~…ĺuŇčsod Ňč majnir~…ĺa) . ńßatiniaj tu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu tukajan, ujda u sun-s…ô ku mikijadańßaj tu ma-ni-r~…ĺa-s…ô. ma-ni-r~…ĺa nikasiŇčaŇčanan itida i sipaja sa, nika ¶aajan kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu kamuan a nika ¶aajan a nipat…ôr~…ĺa ¶an a nipaŇčaŇčan u "majnir~…ĺad, kar~…ĺiŇčatuan itida i ta- ¶ja-r~…ĺu-ji : "maj ujni a jimian, nida a ta- ¶ja-r~…ĺu-ji: "nir~…ĺd u ¶a ¶aj mur~…ĺaŇčawaj tu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj sar~…ĺuŇčanaj a bar~…ĺuan, sasaŇčaan tu ¶a ¶…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺ…ôn tu dawa a kir~…ĺaŇčan, ńßatidaaj tu manauńßaj a tad…ômaw saan " ja sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a nika ¶…ôbar~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺuan, mańßida u m…ôr~…ĺim…ôr~…ĺitan nu mataan" saan, pur~…ĺuŇč…ôn kina sur~…ĺit u ta- ¶ja-r~…ĺu-ji: majnir~…ĺad, ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu kanatar~…ĺan atu tidaaj a ńßuj-r~…ĺi-pin tad…ômawan paŇčaŇčan ńßan u ma-ni-r~…ĺa. pur~…ĺuŇč nu nijadu Ē~ °an nu sabaw tu pitu nu tukajan a nikasakaputan. sakaj ńßuj-r~…ĺi-pin a dajńßiw atu giiŇč tu sapisiŇčkiw mar~…ĺa…ôn…ôm nu nijaduan. sakaj kitakidan nu ginku mar~…ĺa pitu a baataan idaw ku siwa nu nika siŇčaŇčan nu ma-ni-r~…ĺa. :majnir~…ĺad,*******:maj :nir~…ĺad :majnir~…ĺad, (m…ôtro manir~…ĺa), ***. itida i si-pan-ja pid…ôbuŇčan tu r~…ĺi-sun-taw itida i su-r~…ĺu-wan- ¶aw a pikuwanan, ¶a ¶aj ¶i majnir~…ĺ* a sumamadaj nu tad…ômaw nai ma-ni-r~…ĺa nijadu Ē~ °an a par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ, tan…ôŇč mitaajaw mikir~…ĺim i ¶ajtur~…ĺimwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan. sisa, sadikudaj nu tad…ômawan ¶i r~…ĺuo- ¶u-su-r~…ĺaj-man sans…ô itida i pan-ku nikasas…ôts…ôtan a mad…ôm…ô ¶, idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj a s…ôn-ti-ja-k…ô a pawr~…ĺ…ô an kas…ônun ńßan patid…ôŇč i mar~…ĺumanaj nu majnir~…ĺ* a kitidaan. sakikudaj i ¶ajr~…ĺimpi ¶ ¶aj mińß ¶aan …ôn…ôm bur~…ĺad tusip d…ômiad, si-pan-ja mid…ôbuŇčan ¶i mi-k…ô-…ô. r~…ĺuo-p…ô-s…ô. d…ô-r~…ĺaj- ¶ja-s…ô patid…ôŇč tu ma-ni-r~…ĺa, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa mar~…ĺa ńßuj-r~…ĺi-pin babur~…ĺawan a tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu sin- ¶…ôn kitidaan, atu su-u, na-ja, ji-r~…ĺuo mar~…ĺasi-pan-ja war~…ĺian in-tu kanatar~…ĺ ńßuj-r~…ĺi-pin a ńßun- ¶ja a tukajan, ajda nina tukaj idaw ku nipisiŇčan tu nanutawjaaj nikabur~…ĺawan nu r~…ĺikisian. majnir~…ĺ* majnir~…ĺ* . si-pan-ja tajda mabur~…ĺaaw nu dimiadan ******** ¶ajr~…ĺimpi ¶s…ôp mińß ¶aan, makatukuńß ku si-pan-ja a tad…ômaw i ma-ni-r~…ĺa. ¶ajr~…ĺimsiwr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan, si-pan-ja sakamusa ma-ni-r~…ĺa mar~…ĺa ńßuj-r~…ĺi-pin kanatar~…ĺ a subar~…ĺan. ¶ajpi ¶war~…ĺsiw mińß ¶aan, mińßaŇč ku si-pan-ja tu namaka nutawan a kanatar~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺuŇčan patajni tu tuud i tini i ma-ni-r~…ĺa, ju mańßida ¶aaj pik…ôda ku si-pan-ja tu namaka ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a kanatar~…ĺ itida i ńßuj-r~…ĺi-pin mat…ôn…ôs a misiwbaj. ¶ajwar~…ĺr~…ĺusip mińß ¶aan siwa bur~…ĺad …ôn…ôm d…ômiad, tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku Ňčińßa nu si-pan-ja sakamusa ma-ni-r~…ĺa u tada kanatar~…ĺ nu papatajdaan tu tuud a minatuan sa, ńßamaw sa miar~…ĺ…ôs tu sadaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu kanatar~…ĺ a kamuan. ńßida satu namaka ¶uwa ¶uwaaj nu kanatar~…ĺan tajdan namin i ma-ni-r~…ĺa. ¶ajwar~…ĺsiwwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu amir~…ĺika atu si-pan-ja, mad…ôm…ô ¶ ku si-pan-ja, ma-ni-r~…ĺa sumad ńßan u amir~…ĺika ku mikuwanaj. *****, . sakatusa a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan **** ¶ajsiwsipr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj bur~…ĺad tusa d…ômiad, ma-ni-r~…ĺa itida i taj-pin-j…ôŇč nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu kakamuan nu di-pun. ¶ajsiwsipr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan tusa bur~…ĺad tur~…ĺu d…ômiad, ar~…ĺaw…ôn nu amir~…ĺika kina tukaj, nika ańßi ¶a…ôn miput tutaj tu ma-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺa a nikar~…ĺ…ôk…ôp mipataj tu tad…ômaw. sakatusa a nikar~…ĺ…ôp ¶awan, tukaj nu ńßui-r~…ĺi-pin map…ôs…ôŇč namiŇč, nika nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan am…ôr~…ĺik sa misaŇčan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. *********, . tawja ** ¶ajsiwpi ¶r~…ĺim mińß ¶aan, ma-ni-r~…ĺa atu r~…ĺikr~…ĺik nu tukaj misakaput tu ma-ni-r~…ĺa tatuńßuj. ajda a ma-ni-r~…ĺa " mar~…ĺakitakit atu kitakit nu tukaj a mikikiwaj atu wan-r~…ĺu nipatinsuan u kitakit nu ma ¶ian, ńßamin nu kitakidan saka r~…ĺusip nu kasiŇčaŇčanaj nu tatajdaan a tukaj. *****, . kitidaan ** d…ômiad** ma-ni-r~…ĺa u d…ômiad sapakajda i k…ô-p…ôn d…ômiadan a ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan kar~…ĺas…ôŇč…ôs…ôŇč…ôtan. atu ńßu…ô-r~…ĺi-pin a duma nu nijadu Ē~ °an, ńßamin nu ma-ni-r~…ĺa u ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan, mańßida tu r~…ĺar~…ĺud ku s…ôpat a puu Ē~ °an. wi-tu mi ¶api tu ¶…ô Ē~ °-taw, kasumadan nu dimiad adidi Ē~ °, ¶aaj ka tajda i ** * ¶ ńßakija ** * ¶. tar~…ĺakawaj ku kas…ôŇč…ôtan nu dimiadan. i sabaw tusa a bur~…ĺadan katukuńß r~…ĺima bur~…ĺa katin…ôŇčan a kak…ôr~…ĺańßan nu puu Ē~ °, duma nu d…ômiadan dińß…ôku ku nikaudadan. kaudadan tu d…ômid…ômiad nikańß…ôtikan nu udad mapur~…ĺuŇč tu apuju Ē~ ° a d…ômiadan, ¶aaj ka jadańß ku sad…ômiad sananaj a udad. bar~…ĺiwsan i …ôn…ômaj bur~…ĺad katuku siwa bur~…ĺad a nikatajni. itida i tukaj a masanijadu Ē~ °an idaw tu ku r~…ĺ…ôsiŇč mabar~…ĺat. ** * ¶***** * ¶**. .
S.FORM: == Ma-ni-la ť¶¨ŚįľśčČ == Ma-ni-la (Hue-li-pin a kamu:Maynil√†, ngalngal:(maj'nila Ē)Ôľõkamu nu Amilika:Manila), u Men-li-la, Ma-ni-la "kamu nu layak: B√ģn-l√≠-la tatengaay a ngangan u Ma-ni-la-se "Lungsod ng Maynila" u Hue-li-pin a suotu, itida i Hue-li-pin u satabakiay Li-sun-taw Ma-ni-la-wan a timulan nu dadipasan, picidekan Pa-se-sa'wac makayda i tukay nu teban nu niyadu'an, malatusa kina tukay timul amis a kitidaan. mala kanatal nu tapang a sakaudip, lalangawan, cyw-yi, kakulian, cen-ce atu ginginkuan. katukuh tu tuseptusep mihcaan, Ma-ni-la tukay i kitakitan nu sadecdecay a tukayan, maci nu tademaw makaala tu 1,846,516 ku tademaw, Ma-ni-la ina kanatal u kasenengan a tukay, nakaka caysiwsepcay mihcaan pitu bulad lucay demiad a Hue-li-pin wiyunhuy saka 183 banggu ni patucekan. ť¶¨ŚįľśčČ(ŤŹ≤ŚĺčŤ≥ďŤ™ě:Maynil√†, Áôľťü≥:(maj'nila Ē)ÔľõŤčĪŤ™ě:Manila), :B√ģn-l√≠-la),ś≠£ŚľŹŚźćÁ®ĪÁāļť¶¨ŚįľśčČŚłā(Lungsod ng Maynila) . hatiniay tu sakalecad nu tukayan, uyda u Sun-se ku mikiyadahay tu Ma-ni-la-se. Ma-ni-la nikasinganganan itida i sipaya sa, nikacaayan kalecad nu kamuan a nika caayan a nipatelacan a nipangangan u "Maynilad, kalingatuan itida i Ta-cya-lu-yi : "May uyni a yimian, nida a Ta-cya-lu-yi: "nild u cacay mulangaway tu salengacay salunganay a baluan, sasangaan tu cacengelen tu dawa a kilangan, hatidaay tu manauhay a tademaw saan " ya salengacay a nikacebal nu baluan, mahida u melimelitan nu mataan" saan, pulungen kina sulit u Ta-cya-lu-yi: Maynilad, ihekalay nu kanatalan atu tidaay a Huy-li-pin tademawan pangangan han u Ma-ni-la. pulung nu niyadu'an nu sabaw tu pitu nu tukayan a nikasakaputan. sakay Huy-li-pin a dayhiw atu giing tu sapisingkiw malaenem nu niyaduan. sakay kitakidan nu ginku mala pitu a baataan idaw ku siwa nu nika singangan nu Ma-ni-la. :Maynilad,ŤĶ∑śļźśĖľšĽĖŚä†Á•ŅŤ™ě:May :nilad :Maynilad, (Metro Manila), 79šĹć. itida i Si-pan-ya pidebungan tu Li-sun-taw itida i Su-lu-wan-caw a pikuwanan, cacay ci Maynil√† a sumamaday nu tademaw nai Ma-ni-la niyadu'an a palekal, taneng mitaayaw mikilim i caytulimwal mihcaan. sisa, sadikuday nu tademawan ci Luo-cu-su-lay-man sanse itida i Pan-ku nikasasetsetan a mademec, idaw ku cacayay a Sen-ti-ya-ke a pawley an kasenun han patideng i malumanay nu Maynil√† a kitidaan. sakikuday i caylimpiccay mihcaan enem bulad tusip demiad, Si-pan-ya midebungan ci Mi-ke-e. Luo-pey-se. De-lay-cya-se patideng tu Ma-ni-la, kilul sa mala Huy-li-pin babulawan a tatelungan nu sin-cen kitidaan, atu Su-u, Na-ya, Yi-luo malaSi-pan-ya walian In-tu kanatal Huy-li-pin a hun-cya a tukayan, ayda nina tukay idaw ku nipisingan tu nanutawyaay nikabulawan nu likisian. Maynil√† Maynil√† . Si-pan-ya tayda mabulaaw nu dimiadan Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôśģĖśįĎŚúįśôāśúü caylimpicsep mihcaan, makatukuh ku Si-pan-ya a tademaw i Ma-ni-la. caylimsiwlim mihcaan, Si-pan-ya sakamusa Ma-ni-la mala Huy-li-pin kanatal a subalan. caypicwalsiw mihcaan, mihang ku Si-pan-ya tu namaka nutawan a kanatal nu balungan patayni tu tuud i tini i Ma-ni-la, yu mahida caay pikeda ku Si-pan-ya tu namaka hekalay a kanatal itida i Huy-li-pin matenes a misiwbay. caywallusip mihcaan siwa bulad enem demiad, tahekal ku ngiha nu Si-pan-ya sakamusa Ma-ni-la u tada kanatal nu papataydaan tu tuud a minatuan sa, hamaw sa miales tu saday hekalay nu kanatal a kamuan. hida satu namaka cuwacuwaay nu kanatalan taydan namin i Ma-ni-la. caywalsiwwal mihcaan kalepacawan nu Amilika atu Si-pan-ya, mademec ku Si-pan-ya, Ma-ni-la sumad han u Amilika ku mikuwanay. 1570ŚĻī, . sakatusa a nikalepacawan šļĆśąįśôāśúü caysiwsiplu mihcaan cacay bulad tusa demiad, Ma-ni-la itida i Tay-pin-yeng nikalepacawan nu kakamuan nu Di-pun. caysiwsiplim mihcaan tusa bulad tulu demiad, alawen nu Amilika kina tukay, nika ahicaen miput tutay tu Ma-li-la a nikalekep mipatay tu tademaw. sakatusa a nikalepcawan, tukay nu Hui-li-pin mapeseng naming, nika nikalepacawan amelik sa misangan tu luma'. 1942ŚĻī1śúą2śó•, . tawya Áē∂ŚČć caysiwpiclim mihcaan, Ma-ni-la atu liklik nu tukay misakaput tu Ma-ni-la tatuhuy. ayda a Ma-ni-la " malakitakit atu kitakit nu tukay a mikikiway atu wan-lu nipatinsuan u kitakit nu macian, hamin nu kitakidan saka lusip nu kasinganganay nu tataydaan a tukay. 1975ŚĻī, . kitidaan ŚúįÁźÜ demiadśį£ŚÄô Ma-ni-la u demiad sapakayda i Ke-pen demiadan a kacaledesan kalasengesengetan. atu Hue-li-pin a duma nu niyadu'an, hamin nu Ma-ni-la u kacaledesan, mahida tu lalud ku sepat a puu'an. wi-tu micapi tu ce'-taw, kasumadan nu dimiad adidi', caay ka tayda i 20 ¬įC hakiya 38 ¬įC. talakaway ku kasengetan nu dimiadan. i sabaw tusa a buladan katukuh lima bula katinengan a kakelahan nu puu', duma nu demiadan diheku ku nikaudadan. kaudadan tu demidemiad nikahetikan nu udad mapulung tu apuyu' a demiadan, caay ka yadah ku sademiad sananay a udad. baliwsan i enemay bulad katuku siwa bulad a nikatayni. itida i tukay a masaniyadu'an idaw tu ku lesing mabalat. 20 ¬įCšĽ•šłčśąĖ38 ¬įCšĽ•šłä. .
